creator: flo@FreeBSD.org
text:
njs was updated to 0.7.12 for www/nginx-devel, it should probably be updated to at least 0.7.11 for www/nginx

https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-rc94-438g-7v38
https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-qmh7-2w4g-hwv8
https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-c799-xf29-f54x
https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-2jqf-9377-3hhp

https://github.com/nginx/njs/issues/615
https://github.com/nginx/njs/issues/617
https://github.com/nginx/njs/issues/618
https://github.com/nginx/njs/issues/619

I would have added a vuxml, but I couldn't figure out how to match nginx only when built with njs < 0.7.11, I think that's not possible currently. I didn't want to add <lt>1.22.1_5</lt>  because it's not guaranteed to be fixed in 1.22.1_6.
